channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What America Gets Right
item.description: We are living in the greatest moment in U.S. and human history, by almost every measure.

item.title: Trump says Netanyahu knows who is in charge ahead of possible White House visit
item.description: President Trump told Axios that Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu requested a meeting, which may occur at the White House.

item.title: Democrats plan subpoena campaign over Trump's $2 billion gold rush
item.description: Democrats are preparing a critical audit of President Trump and his circle, aiming to expose and end his lucrative presidency.

item.title: Why this July 4 weekend poses a wildfire tinderbox risk
item.description: Extreme heat, drought, and dangerous fire weather increase wildfire risks across the U.S. West ahead of the July 4 weekend.
